messages.text: I'll help you explore the Apache Kafka codebase and answer these orientation questions. Let me start by creating a plan to systematically investigate the repository.

Analyze the Apache Kafka codebase at /workspace. Please provide:  1. Overview of the root directory structure - what are the main directories and files? 2. List of core modules (in core directories like core, clients, br...

Explore the Apache Kafka codebase to understand how topic creation works. Please trace the complete flow from client to broker:  1. **Client-Side Topic Creation:**    - Look for TopicCommand class in /workspace/tools/src...
